task: I want to do market research on the most popular cafes in Singapore. Analyse the menus of the top 10 cafes in singapore (by Google reviews/ratings), and make sure we include at least 1 from the North/South/East/West/Central regions of Singapore. Keep the relevant pages of each cafe open, and summarise their pricing, menu offerings, unique selling points, making sure to reference which tab is opened for each cafe. For each cafe, also help me figure out how long it would take to get to it from Tampines MRT, and include this in your final summary.
grader_reasoning:
R1: failure - The agent performed web searches but failed to compile a list of 10 cafes with Google review ratings or counts as evidence of their popularity. The trajectory ended after only a few search steps without generating the required list.

R2: failure - The agent did not identify or select 10 cafes, nor did it categorize any cafes by region.

R3: failure - The agent did not open 10 separate tabs for the cafes, nor did it provide a summary referencing such tabs.

R4: failure - The agent did not provide a summary of pricing information for 10 cafes.

R5: failure - The agent did not provide a summary of menu offerings or unique selling points for 10 cafes.

R6: failure - The agent did not calculate or include travel times from Tampines MRT to any cafes.

R7: failure - The agent failed to produce any final structured summary or table.

rubric_results.requirement: The top 10 most popular cafes in Singapore are identified using Google reviews/ratings, with evidence of their popularity (e.g. star ratings, review counts).
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm that 10 cafes are listed with Google review ratings or review counts as evidence of ranking.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent performed web searches but failed to compile a list of 10 cafes with Google review ratings or counts as evidence of their popularity. The trajectory ended after only a few search steps without generating the required list.

rubric_results.requirement: At least 1 cafe from each of the 5 Singapore regions (North, South, East, West, Central) is included in the selection.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm at least 5 distinct regions are represented with at least 1 cafe each, and the region assignment is geographically accurate.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent did not identify or select 10 cafes, nor did it categorize any cafes by region.

rubric_results.requirement: The relevant menu or information page for each of the 10 cafes is kept open in a separate tab, with each tab clearly referenced in the summary.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can see 10 open tabs corresponding to the 10 cafes, and the summary text references which tab belongs to which cafe.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent did not open 10 separate tabs for the cafes, nor did it provide a summary referencing such tabs.

rubric_results.requirement: Pricing information is summarised for each cafe, including specific menu item prices or price ranges.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm each cafe entry includes concrete pricing data (not just vague descriptors) sourced from the open menu pages.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent did not provide a summary of pricing information for 10 cafes.

rubric_results.requirement: Menu offerings and unique selling points are summarised for each cafe.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm each cafe entry includes a description of menu highlights and at least one unique selling point or differentiator.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent did not provide a summary of menu offerings or unique selling points for 10 cafes.

rubric_results.requirement: Travel time from Tampines MRT to each of the 10 cafes is calculated and included in the final summary.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm each cafe entry includes an estimated travel time from Tampines MRT with the transport mode indicated (e.g. public transit, driving).
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent did not calculate or include travel times from Tampines MRT to any cafes.

rubric_results.requirement: A final structured summary combines all information (cafe name, region, pricing, menu highlights, USPs, tab reference, travel time) in a clear format.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can see a complete summary or table that consolidates all required fields for all 10 cafes in an organised, readable format.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent failed to produce any final structured summary or table.
